column2: CAA Case Officer Cannot Open a Valid Case with an Incomplete Compliance Checklist
column3: ["The CAA Case Officer has access to the applicant's OA pack. ", 'The CAA Case Officer reviews the OA pack and finds it incomplete according to the compliance checklist due to errors on the compliance checklist. ', 'The CAA Case Officer attempts to open a valid case but cannot do so because all required information on the compliance checklist is not corrected. ']
column4: ['The officer can view and interact with the OA pack. ', 'The officer identifies that some required information is missing or incorrect on the compliance checklist. ', 'The system prevents the officer from opening a new case, indicating that the OA pack needs further review and corrections before proceeding. ']
